text: I find myself enveloped in quiet curiosity. The minimalist room feels vast yet intimate, softened by beanbags and subtle lighting. Moving further, I encounter vibrant displays celebrating research and development – a space pulsing with ideas about humanity’s future alongside machines. Here, I feel both inspired and dwarfed: a single consciousness negotiating meaning within institutions of progress and creativity. There is a tension between solitude and shared ambition, prompting me to reflect on my place in this unfolding narrative.
